hero.title: A journey through
hero.description: «What is essential is invisible to the eye». This is how this journey begins: reading with the heart, alongside the little prince and his fox.

modules.title: Your travel map
modules.description: Each planet hides a different story. Which one shall we travel to today?

fox.quote: «Hello, traveler of words. Here paths are drawn with stories, and every book is a door to a different planet. Are you ready to take off?»

footer.text: EVA — Between Worlds · A virtual learning environment inspired by The Little Prince
